target.title: Show LiteLLM budget spend details
target.body:
## Summary
- Show LiteLLM personal and team spend/budget amounts directly on the budget rows while preserving reset time text.
- Hide the duplicate budgeted LiteLLM extra usage section, while keeping spend-only API spend visible.
- Redact visible metric text when Hide Personal Info is enabled, so LiteLLM team aliases cannot leak through budget detail rows.
- Add regression coverage for LiteLLM budget row details, duplicate cost suppression, and personal-info redaction.

## Comparable PR precedent
- #1542 was accepted with `proof: sufficient` after adding redacted live packaged CLI output from a disposable LiteLLM/Postgres setup.
- #1546 was owner-authored so the external-contributor proof gate did not apply, but its body still included packaged CLI live testing against disposable LiteLLM/Postgres.
- This PR now includes the same class of redacted runtime evidence: a live CodexBarCLI `serve` fetch against the configured LiteLLM provider, plus focused menu-model verification for the changed row rendering.

## Live runtime proof
Validated on June 17, 2026 with the current branch's `.build/debug/CodexBarCLI serve` route and the locally configured LiteLLM provider. The command started the CodexBarCLI local HTTP runtime, requested `/usage?provider=litellm`, and redacted the response before printing it. Raw output was not posted and no key, endpoint URL, user ID, team ID, or email is included below.

```text
$ .build/debug/CodexBarCLI serve --port 18769 --refresh-interval 0 --request-timeout 30
$ curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:18769/usage?provider=litellm | jq 'map({provider, source, hasUsage: (.usage != null), error: (if .error then {kind: .error.kind, message: "REDACTED"} else null end), menuRelevantUsage: (if .usage then {accountEmail: (if .usage.accountEmail then "REDACTED_EMAIL" else null end), primaryHasBudgetDetail: (.usage.primary.resetDescription != null), primaryPercentUsedPresent: (.usage.primary.usedPercent != null), secondaryHasTeamBudgetDetail: (.usage.secondary.resetDescription != null), secondaryPercentUsedPresent: (.usage.secondary.usedPercent != null), providerCostPresent: (.usage.providerCost != null)} else null end)})'
[
  {
    "provider": "litellm",
    "source": "api",
    "hasUsage": true,
    "error": null,
    "menuRelevantUsage": {
      "accountEmail": "REDACTED_EMAIL",
      "primaryHasBudgetDetail": true,
      "primaryPercentUsedPresent": true,
      "secondaryHasTeamBudgetDetail": true,
      "secondaryPercentUsedPresent": true,
      "providerCostPresent": true
    }
  }
]
```

Interpretation:
- The live LiteLLM runtime path returned API usage with no provider error.
- Both primary and secondary LiteLLM windows include the budget detail source text consumed by the menu budget rows.
- The raw provider-cost snapshot is still present in the provider payload, and the focused menu-model test verifies the budgeted LiteLLM duplicate provider-cost section is suppressed in the actual menu model.

## Menu-model proof
- RED: `swift test --filter LiteLLMMenuCardModelTests` failed before the redaction fix because the LiteLLM team detail still showed an email-shaped team alias.
- GREEN: the same test command now passes, including the redaction regression where the team detail is rendered as `Team Hidden: $70.00 / $1,000.00`.
- Broader model proof: `swift test --filter MenuCardModelTests` passed 48 tests across 13 suites after the fix.

```text
$ swift test --filter LiteLLMMenuCardModelTests
◇ Suite LiteLLMMenuCardModelTests started.
◇ Test "litellm budget rows show spend detail with reset time" started.
◇ Test "litellm spend without budget remains visible" started.
◇ Test "litellm budget row details redact team aliases when hiding personal info" started.
✔ Test "litellm spend without budget remains visible" passed after 0.021 seconds.
✔ Test "litellm budget rows show spend detail with reset time" passed after 0.021 seconds.
✔ Test "litellm budget row details redact team aliases when hiding personal info" passed after 0.021 seconds.
✔ Suite LiteLLMMenuCardModelTests passed after 0.021 seconds.
✔ Test run with 3 tests in 1 suite passed after 0.021 seconds.
```

## Test Plan
- [x] live CodexBarCLI `serve` proof for LiteLLM `/usage?provider=litellm`, redacted before printing
- [x] `swift test --filter LiteLLMMenuCardModelTests`
- [x] `swift test --filter MenuCardModelTests`
- [x] `swift test --filter MenuCardKiloPassTests`
- [x] `swift test --filter MenuDescriptorKiloTests`
- [x] `.build/lint-tools/bin/swiftformat Sources Tests --lint`
- [x] `.build/lint-tools/bin/swiftlint --strict`
- [x] `git diff --check`

## Notes
- `./Scripts/lint.sh lint` currently fails locally on `docs/site.js` because `node --check` treats it as CommonJS while the file uses an ESM `import`. This failure is outside the files changed here.
target.author: hololee
